---
title: "ell_row_softmax"
generated: true
description: "Row-wise softmax over the ELL neighbour slots, masking padding."
---

[ŌĆ╣ back to `nitrix.semiring.ell_edge`](../nitrix-semiring-ell_edge.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:ell_row_softmax -->
```python
ell_row_softmax(scores: Float[Array, '... n k_max'], ell: ELL) -> Float[Array, '... n k_max']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:ell_row_softmax -->
Row-wise softmax over the ELL neighbour slots, masking padding.

Normalises `scores` along the `k_max` (neighbour) axis so each
row sums to 1, with the ELL's padding positions excluded from both
the numerator and the denominator.  This is the attention
pre-pass for GAT / GATv2-style aggregation: compute per-edge
scores, [`ell_row_softmax`](../nitrix-semiring-ell_edge/ell_row_softmax.qmd) them into attention weights, then
feed the weights as the ELL `values` (or multiply them into the
message) of a [`semiring_ell_edge_aggregate`](../nitrix-semiring-ell_edge/semiring_ell_edge_aggregate.qmd) under the real
semiring.

Padding is identified from the ELL convention: pad slots carry
`ell.values == ell.identity`.  Those positions are forced to
$-\infty$ before the softmax (so they contribute $0$
after the exponential) and contribute $0$ to the denominator.
A row that is entirely padding (an isolated vertex) returns all-zero
weights rather than `NaN`.

Unlike the rest of this module, [`ell_row_softmax`](../nitrix-semiring-ell_edge/ell_row_softmax.qmd) takes the
whole [`ELL`](../nitrix-sparse.qmd) rather than a bare `indices`
array: it needs `ell.values` / `ell.identity` to build the
padding mask.  When `ell.identity` is `None` (sentinels handled
by the caller) no masking is applied and every slot participates.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:ell_row_softmax -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `scores` | `Float` | `...` ├Ś `n` ├Ś `k_max` | ŌĆö | Per-edge attention logits aligned with the ELL pattern, `(..., n, k_max)`. `scores[..., i, p]` is the score of the edge from `i` to `ell.indices[i, p]`. |
| `ell` | `ELL` | ŌĆö | ŌĆö | The adjacency whose padding structure defines which slots are real edges. |

**Returns** `Float` ŌĆö shape `...` ├Ś `n` ├Ś `k_max`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:ell_row_softmax -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `k_max` | *(undocumented ŌĆö add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
